text.title: Accessibility Basics Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the audit scope a single page or PR (≤5 minutes)?

branch.question: Did you run BOTH axe AND the 5-step manual check?

text.example: Concrete walk: Signup page (one URL) → axe finds 2 violations + manual finds focus-trap → report published with manual statement attached.
